events.title: Chinmaya Amrit Yatra — National Pilgrimage (Wisdom on Wheels)
events.description: A 295-day national pilgrimage celebrating the 75-year legacy of the Chinmaya Movement, traveling 35,000 km across India from Pune to Delhi. During this window the Yatra moves through Kerala, Tamil Nadu, AP, Telangana, Odisha, Jharkhand, West Bengal, Sikkim, Assam and the Northeast.
events.venue_address: Multi-city itinerary; begins Chinmaya Vibhooti, Kolwan, Pune; concludes Bharat Mandapam, New Delhi (23 Oct 2026)

events.title: Chinmaya Jayanti Camp at Sidhbari — 110th Birth Anniversary Camp
events.description: Week-long residential camp at Sandeepany Himalayas celebrating the 110th birth anniversary of Pujya Gurudev Swami Chinmayananda. Talks in English by Swami Swaroopananda on Gita Panchamrit and Chinmaya Mahima — A Meditation, plus Hindi Vedanta Course conclusion ceremony, guided meditation, group discussions, and Guru Paduka Puja.
events.venue_address: Sandeepany Himalayas, Tapovan Road, Sidhbari, Dharamshala, Distt. Kangra, Himachal Pradesh, 176057

events.title: Hindi Vedanta Course Conclusion Ceremony — Sandeepany Himalayas
